title: We Watched Melania Trump’s Documentary. Here’s What It Reveals.
title_cn: 我们观看了梅拉尼娅·特朗普的纪录片。以下是它的揭示。

paragraphs.cn: 2026年1月30日 东部时间下午7:28

paragraphs.en: Waves crash along the Palm Beach shoreline and a drone shot swoops over the grounds of Mar-a-Lago before landing at a pair of stilettos donned by Melania Trump. As the Rolling Stones’ “Gimme Shelter” plays, the then-incoming first lady jets from her Florida mansion to her New York City penthouse.
paragraphs.cn: 海浪拍打着棕榈滩的海岸线，一架无人机掠过海湖庄园上空，最终镜头落在梅拉尼娅·特朗普脚上的一双细高跟鞋上。伴随着滚石乐队的《Gimme Shelter》的音乐，这位即将上任的第一夫人从她在佛罗里达的豪宅飞往她在纽约市的顶层公寓。

paragraphs.en: So begins the cinematic and carefully crafted hour and 44 minute film about Melania Trump as she prepares to step back into the White House. The film captures events in the days leading up to President Trump’s second inauguration.
paragraphs.cn: 这部关于梅拉尼娅·特朗普的电影由此拉开序幕，时长1小时44分钟，制作精良，充满电影感，记录了她准备重返白宫的过程。影片捕捉了特朗普总统第二次就职典礼前几天的事件。

paragraphs.en: “Everyone wants to know. So here it is: 20 days in my life, family, business, philanthropy and becoming first lady of the United States again,” she narrates.
paragraphs.cn: “每个人都想知道。所以，这就是：我生命中的20天，关于我的家庭、事业、慈善事业以及再次成为美国第一夫人，”她旁白道。

paragraphs.en: Here are takeaways from the movie, which premiered in theaters Friday.
paragraphs.cn: 以下是这部电影的看点，该片于周五在影院首映。

paragraphs.en: The film was directed by Brett Ratner, of Rush Hour fame, and co-produced by Melania and her longtime agent and adviser Marc Beckman. Melania delivers voice-over narration as she goes from event to event and discusses her philanthropic platform, Be Best.
paragraphs.cn: 这部电影由因《尖峰时刻》而闻名的布莱特·拉特纳执导，梅拉尼娅和她的长期经纪人兼顾问马克·贝克曼共同制作。梅拉尼娅在影片中穿梭于各种活动之间，并讲述了她的慈善平台“Be Best”，同时进行画外音旁白。

paragraphs.en: Amazon MGM Studios paid an unprecedented $40 million for distribution rights, and after a theatrical release the movie will be streamed online. A three-part series is expected to follow.
paragraphs.cn: 亚马逊米高梅影业为该片的发行权支付了前所未有的4000万美元，在院线发行后，该片将在网上流媒体播放。预计随后还将推出一个三部曲系列。

paragraphs.en: The first time Donald Trump appears in the film, he is a voice coming through Melania’s iPhone as she sits at a gilded desk in their Fifth Avenue penthouse.
paragraphs.cn: 唐纳德·特朗普首次出现在影片中时，他的声音通过梅拉尼娅的iPhone传来，当时她正坐在他们第五大道顶层公寓里的一张镀金书桌旁。

paragraphs.en: “Hi, Mr. President, congratulations,” Melania Trump says. “Did you watch it?” Trump asks, referring to the counting and certification of electoral votes in early 2025. “I did not,” Melania replies.
paragraphs.cn: “嗨，总统先生，恭喜您，”梅拉尼娅·特朗普说。“你看了吗？”特朗普问道，指的是2025年初的选举人票计票和认证。“我没有，”梅拉尼娅回答。

paragraphs.en: The two appear close in the film, holding hands and discussing their son Barron. But the movie also displays the independent lives they lead. Melania Trump travels alone several times in the film, and she is frequently on her own as she attends to her business.
paragraphs.cn: 影片中，两人显得亲密无间，手牵手讨论他们的儿子巴伦。但电影也展现了他们各自独立的生活。梅拉尼娅·特朗普在影片中多次独自旅行，并且经常独自处理她的事务。

paragraphs.en: Melania Trump demonstrates how she gives input, asking the president to include that he will be a “peacemaker and unifier” in his Inauguration speech. He turns and gives her a smile after delivering that line inside the Capitol rotunda.
paragraphs.cn: 梅拉尼娅·特朗普展示了她如何提出建议，要求总统在他的就职演说中加入他将成为“和平缔造者和团结者”的内容。在国会大厦圆形大厅内发表这番话后，他转身对她报以微笑。

paragraphs.en: The 19-year-old son of Donald and Melania Trump, Barron, is frequently seen with his mother in the movie but doesn’t speak during the film. The first lady shares the pride she has in her son as she tells Queen Rania of Jordan, during a visit at Mar-a-Lago, about how he attends NYU Stern Business School. She also reminisces about how Mar-a-Lago is where her father gave Barron swim lessons, Donald Trump played golf with Barron, and Barron took his first tennis lessons with her.
paragraphs.cn: 唐纳德和梅拉尼娅·特朗普19岁的儿子巴伦在电影中经常与母亲一同出现，但在影片中并未开口说话。第一夫人向约旦王后拉尼娅在海湖庄园的一次访问中分享了她对儿子的骄傲，讲述了巴伦如何就读纽约大学斯特恩商学院。她还回忆起海湖庄园是她父亲教巴伦游泳的地方，唐纳德·特朗普和巴伦一起打高尔夫，以及巴伦和她一起上第一堂网球课的经历。

paragraphs.en: “From an early age, he was forced to learn about the importance of maintaining composure, integrity and self discipline. Although I guide him, it’s very important that he lives the life that he wants to live,” Melania says in the film.
paragraphs.cn: “从小，他就被迫学习保持沉着、正直和自律的重要性。尽管我引导他，但让他过自己想过的生活非常重要，”梅拉尼娅在影片中说。

paragraphs.en: The film gives a glossy glimpse inside the world of Melania, a deeply private woman who seldom gives interviews and is selective about when and where she appears in public as first lady.
paragraphs.cn: 这部电影光鲜地展现了梅拉尼娅的世界，她是一个极度注重隐私的女性，很少接受采访，并且作为第一夫人，她对何时何地公开露面都非常挑剔。

paragraphs.en: In January 2024, Melania Trump’s mother, Amalija Knavs, died at the age of 78. Melania talks about the loss of her mother several times during the film. After attending Jimmy Carter’s funeral, Melania goes to St. Patrick’s Cathedral in New York to light a candle and say a prayer for her mother.
paragraphs.cn: 2024年1月，梅拉尼娅·特朗普的母亲阿马利娅·克纳夫斯去世，享年78岁。梅拉尼娅在影片中多次谈及失去母亲的悲痛。在参加吉米·卡特的葬礼后，梅拉尼娅前往纽约圣帕特里克大教堂为她的母亲点燃蜡烛并祈祷。

paragraphs.en: “Mourning the loss of my mother will always remain,” Melania Trump says as she walks down the aisle of the cathedral.
paragraphs.cn: “失去母亲的悲痛将永远存在，”梅拉尼娅·特朗普走在大教堂的过道上时说。

paragraphs.en: In another scene, Melania Trump meets with Aviva Siegel, a former Israeli hostage who was held captive for 51 days in Gaza. The two share a hug and Melania Trump tells her that her husband will work on freeing the hostages. “Meeting Aviva was very emotional. You don’t forget those people,” Melania says.
paragraphs.cn: 在另一个场景中，梅拉尼娅·特朗普会见了阿维娃·西格尔，她是一名曾被哈马斯在加沙扣押51天的前以色列人质。两人拥抱，梅拉尼娅·特朗普告诉她，她的丈夫将致力于解救人质。“见到阿维娃非常感人。你不会忘记那些人，”梅拉尼娅说。

paragraphs.en: Melania shares playful moments such as singing along to Michael Jackson’s “Billie Jean” and dancing to “YMCA.”
paragraphs.cn: 梅拉尼娅分享了一些有趣的时刻，比如跟着迈克尔·杰克逊的《Billie Jean》唱歌，以及跳《YMCA》。

paragraphs.en: The film blends cinéma-vérité footage with occasional straight to the camera observations from people close to Melania Trump, such as her designer, Hervé Pierre, and her father, Viktor Knavs.
paragraphs.cn: 这部电影将真实电影（cinéma-vérité）的镜头与梅拉尼娅·特朗普身边亲近的人，如她的设计师埃尔韦·皮埃尔和她的父亲维克托·克纳夫斯，偶尔直接面向镜头的评论结合在一起。

paragraphs.en: A former fashion model and design student, Melania Trump pays special attention to her clothing and decor in the movie. The film begins with a scene where Melania Trump is working with Pierre and Adam Lippes, another designer, from her penthouse to finalize her Inauguration outfits.
paragraphs.cn: 作为一名前时尚模特和设计学生，梅拉尼娅·特朗普在电影中特别关注她的服装和装饰。影片开头的一个场景是，梅拉尼娅·特朗普在她的顶层公寓里与皮埃尔和另一位设计师亚当·利佩斯一起敲定她的就职典礼服装。

paragraphs.en: “We speak the same language,” Pierre explains as they go over the specific cut of fabric.
paragraphs.cn: “我们说着同一种语言，”皮埃尔在他们讨论布料的具体剪裁时解释道。

paragraphs.en: Melania also spends time in the film showing her collaboration with event planner David Monn on details for the Candlelight Dinner during the Inauguration, down to the red invitations, and her work with interior designer Tham Kannalikham picking out china and furniture for her second time in the White House.
paragraphs.cn: 梅拉尼娅还在影片中展示了她与活动策划师大卫·蒙恩合作，敲定就职典礼期间烛光晚宴的细节，甚至包括红色请柬；以及她与室内设计师塔姆·坎纳利卡姆合作，为她第二次入主白宫挑选瓷器和家具。

paragraphs.en: The film crews had remarkable access to the Trumps’ private residences and the Capitol and White House complexes.
paragraphs.cn: 摄制组获得了非凡的权限，得以进入特朗普夫妇的私人住宅以及国会大厦和白宫建筑群。

paragraphs.en: The night before the Inauguration, the Trump family stays, as per tradition, in Blair House, the official guesthouse of the White House. The cameras take the audience inside the building and show the Trumps interacting with the staff—Donald Trump even talks about leaving tips for the wait staff upstairs in the residence. There is footage of the highly choreographed move-in and move-out process that happens every four years when a new first family moves into the White House.
paragraphs.cn: 就职典礼前夜，特朗普一家按照传统入住白宫官方宾馆布莱尔宫。摄像机带领观众进入这座建筑，展示了特朗普夫妇与工作人员的互动——唐纳德·特朗普甚至谈到要给楼上住所的服务员留下小费。影片中还有每四年新第一家庭入住白宫时，高度精心编排的搬入和搬出过程的镜头。

paragraphs.en: When Donald and Melania Trump are receiving a briefing on Inauguration Day plans, the president complains about the college football national championship being scheduled for the same night.
paragraphs.cn: 当唐纳德和梅拉尼娅·特朗普听取就职典礼日计划的简报时，总统抱怨大学橄榄球全国锦标赛被安排在同一晚举行。

paragraphs.en: The film ends with shots of the White House portraits of a few first ladies, including Eleanor Roosevelt and Jackie Kennedy, and Melania Trump’s own first lady portrait photo shoot.
paragraphs.cn: 影片最后展示了几位前第一夫人的白宫肖像，包括埃莉诺·罗斯福和杰奎琳·肯尼迪，以及梅拉尼娅·特朗普自己的第一夫人肖像照拍摄。

paragraphs.en: Meridith McGraw is a reporter covering the White House for The Wall Street Journal in Washington. She joined the Journal from Politico, where she was national political correspondent and covered the 2024 presidential election. She started at Politico in 2019 as a White House reporter.
paragraphs.cn: 梅里迪思·麦格劳是《华尔街日报》驻华盛顿的白宫记者。她从Politico加入《华尔街日报》，此前在Politico担任全国政治记者，并报道了2024年总统选举。她于2019年作为白宫记者加入Politico。

paragraphs.en: Meridith is the author of "Trump in Exile," which chronicled Donald Trump's postpresidency after he lost the 2020 election.
paragraphs.cn: 梅里迪思是《流亡中的特朗普》一书的作者，该书记录了唐纳德·特朗普在2020年大选失败后的总统卸任生活。

paragraphs.en: Previously, Meridith was a White House reporter and producer for ABC News. Meridith graduated from the University of Texas at Austin, and holds a master’s degree from Columbia University Graduate School of Journalism. She grew up in West Virginia.
paragraphs.cn: 此前，梅里迪思曾是美国广播公司新闻的白宫记者兼制片人。梅里迪思毕业于德克萨斯大学奥斯汀分校，并拥有哥伦比亚大学新闻学院的硕士学位。她在西弗吉尼亚州长大。

vocabulary.meaning_en: arriving or coming in; about to take up a position.
vocabulary.example: the then-incoming first lady jets from her Florida mansion to her New York City penthouse.
vocabulary.example_cn: 这位即将上任的第一夫人从她在佛罗里达的豪宅飞往她在纽约市的顶层公寓。

vocabulary.meaning_en: made or created with skill and care.
vocabulary.meaning_cn: 精心制作的；精心设计的
vocabulary.example: So begins the cinematic and carefully crafted hour and 44 minute film about Melania Trump.
vocabulary.example_cn: 这部关于梅拉尼娅·特朗普的电影由此拉开序幕，时长1小时44分钟，制作精良，充满电影感。

vocabulary.meaning_en: relating to or characterized by philanthropy (the desire to promote the welfare of others, expressed especially by the generous donation of money to good causes).
vocabulary.example: Melania delivers voice-over narration as she goes from event to event and discusses her philanthropic platform, Be Best.
vocabulary.example_cn: 梅拉尼娅在影片中穿梭于各种活动之间，并讲述了她的慈善平台“Be Best”，同时进行画外音旁白。

vocabulary.meaning_cn: 前所未有的；史无前例的
vocabulary.example: Amazon MGM Studios paid an unprecedented $40 million for distribution rights.
vocabulary.example_cn: 亚马逊米高梅影业为该片的发行权支付了前所未有的4000万美元。

vocabulary.meaning_en: the action or process of providing someone or something with an official document attesting to a status or level of achievement.
vocabulary.example: Trump asks, referring to the counting and certification of electoral votes in early 2025.
vocabulary.example_cn: 特朗普问道，指的是2025年初的选举人票计票和认证。

vocabulary.meaning_en: the state or feeling of being calm and in control of oneself.
vocabulary.example: From an early age, he was forced to learn about the importance of maintaining composure, integrity and self discipline.
vocabulary.example_cn: 从小，他就被迫学习保持沉着、正直和自律的重要性。

vocabulary.example: a deeply private woman who seldom gives interviews and is selective about when and where she appears in public as first lady.
vocabulary.example_cn: 她是一个极度注重隐私的女性，很少接受采访，并且作为第一夫人，她对何时何地公开露面都非常挑剔。

vocabulary.meaning_en: complete (a plan, arrangement, or piece of work) and make it ready for use or implementation.
vocabulary.example: Melania Trump is working with Pierre and Adam Lippes, another designer, from her penthouse to finalize her Inauguration outfits.
vocabulary.example_cn: 梅拉尼娅·特朗普在她的顶层公寓里与皮埃尔和另一位设计师亚当·利佩斯一起敲定她的就职典礼服装。

vocabulary.meaning_en: the action of working with someone to produce or create something.
vocabulary.example: Melania also spends time in the film showing her collaboration with event planner David Monn on details for the Candlelight Dinner.
vocabulary.example_cn: 梅拉尼娅还在影片中展示了她与活动策划师大卫·蒙恩合作，敲定烛光晚宴的细节。

vocabulary.meaning_en: arranged or planned in a very careful and detailed way.
vocabulary.meaning_cn: 精心编排的；精心策划的
vocabulary.example: There is footage of the highly choreographed move-in and move-out process that happens every four years.
vocabulary.example_cn: 影片中还有每四年新第一家庭入住白宫时，高度精心编排的搬入和搬出过程的镜头。
